== Notes for [[Item:Q90252|Q90252]] ==

'''
=Lucius Vipstanus Claudius Poplicola Messalla=
'''

Lucius Vipstanus Claudius Poplicola Messalla (c. 105 – aft. 140) was a sal. col. and a quadrumvir quinquennalis in 140.

He was the son of Lucius Vipstanus Messalla and wife.

He married his fifth cousin Helvidia Priscilla, born c. 115, daughter of Publius Helvidius Priscus and wife Plautia Quinctilia and had a son Lucius Valerius Messalla Thrasea Poplicola Helvidius Priscus.

'''Source :'''

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lucius_Vipstanus_Claudius_Poplicola_Messalla

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
